top_signals.title: Copper Heads for Weekly Gain as Traders Look Past Iran Flare-Up
top_signals.summary: Copper was on track for its second straight weekly gain as investors looked past potential demand headwinds presented by the mid-week resurgence in fighting in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Refineries in Gulf and Russia hit by impact of wars, while global consumption has remained high

top_signals.title: The weak yen is not Japan’s new strength. It is a warning.
top_signals.summary: The absence of Japan-bashing should not be mistaken for international approval. It may simply mean the world no longer sees Japan as the central imbalance problem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: LNG Tankers Resume Hormuz Crossings Amid Tensions
top_signals.summary: More liquefied natural gas tankers have resumed transiting the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, ship-tracking data showed, and 22 Japan-linked vessels have left the Gulf since Tuesday, Tokyo said, despite renewed fighting in the Middle East.The Strait of Hormuz…

top_signals.title: Former ransomware negotiator gets 4 years for BlackCat attacks
top_signals.summary: A former employee of cybersecurity incident response company DigitalMint was sentenced to 70 months in prison for targeting U.S. companies in BlackCat (ALPHV) ransomware attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Long Bonds Rally: 3-Minutes MLIV
top_signals.summary: Guy Johnson, Lizzy Burden and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Injective SDK on npm infected with cryptocurrency wallet stealer
top_signals.summary: Hackers compromised the Injective Labs SDK project's GitHub repository and used it to publish a malicious package on the Node Package Manager (npm) that stole cryptocurrency wallet private keys and mnemonic seed phrases. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Hidden Security Risks of Reduced Summer IT Coverage
top_signals.summary: Security operations don't slow down when IT teams take vacation, but staffing levels often do. Kaseya explains how AI-driven automation can help organizations maintain consistent security operations and reduce reliance on manual processes year-round. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Study values GBM’s Ontario graphite mine restart at $183M
top_signals.summary: GBM’s Kearney graphite mine restart in Ontario gets a $183M valuation, highlighting strong returns and Canada’s critical minerals push.
